isolation.boundary: repository-local commands only; no service restarts

assertions.title: TypeScript CRUD create returns record with ID

steps.action: Run: cd "/Users/sdawka/Code/bropilot/packages/crud" && npx vitest run src/__tests__/crud.test.ts -t "inserts a record and returns it with auto-generated id" --reporter=verbose
steps.expected: Create test passes with response shape { ok: true, data: { id, title, status } }.
steps.observed: Test passed: Crud > create (without schema) > inserts a record and returns it with auto-generated id.

evidence.snippet: ✓ Crud > create (without schema) > inserts a record and returns it with auto-generated id

assertions.title: TypeScript CRUD read retrieves by ID

steps.action: Run: cd "/Users/sdawka/Code/bropilot/packages/crud" && npx vitest run src/__tests__/crud.test.ts -t "retrieves an existing record by ID|read not_found returns" --reporter=verbose
steps.expected: Read returns existing record; missing ID returns { ok: false, error: 'not_found' }.
steps.observed: Both tests passed: read retrieval and read not_found contract case.

evidence.snippet: ✓ Crud > read > retrieves an existing record by ID; ✓ API contract matches Elixir CRUD contract > read not_found returns { ok: false, error: 'not_found' }

steps.action: Run: cd "/Users/sdawka/Code/bropilot/packages/crud" && npx vitest run src/__tests__/crud.test.ts -t "merges attributes and preserves unchanged fields|update not_found returns" --reporter=verbose
steps.expected: Update merges fields and non-existent ID returns not_found.
steps.observed: Both tests passed: merged update behavior and update not_found contract case.

evidence.snippet: ✓ Crud > update (without schema) > merges attributes and preserves unchanged fields; ✓ ... > update not_found returns { ok: false, error: 'not_found' }

steps.action: Run: cd "/Users/sdawka/Code/bropilot/packages/crud" && npx vitest run src/__tests__/crud.test.ts -t "removes a record" --reporter=verbose
steps.expected: Delete returns { ok: true } and subsequent read is not_found.
steps.observed: Delete flow test passed and includes post-delete read check in assertion body.

assertions.title: TypeScript CRUD list with filters and pagination

steps.action: Run: cd "/Users/sdawka/Code/bropilot/packages/crud" && npx vitest run src/__tests__/crud.test.ts -t "filters first, then paginates|returns correct page size" --reporter=verbose
steps.expected: Filtered/paginated list returns correct subset and pagination metadata.
steps.observed: Both relevant tests passed for filter+pagination and page metadata counts.

evidence.snippet: ✓ Crud > list with pagination > returns correct page size; ✓ Crud > list with filter + pagination > filters first, then paginates

assertions.title: TypeScript CRUD schema validation rejects invalid data

steps.action: Run: cd "/Users/sdawka/Code/bropilot/packages/crud" && npx vitest run src/__tests__/crud.test.ts -t "rejects both missing required and invalid enum" --reporter=verbose
steps.expected: Invalid create returns { ok: false, errors: [...] } with field-level validation info.
steps.observed: Validation test passed for missing title + invalid enum in one request.

evidence.snippet: ✓ Crud > create (with schema validation) > rejects both missing required and invalid enum

assertions.title: TypeScript CRUD API contract matches Elixir CRUD contract

steps.action: Run: cd "/Users/sdawka/Code/bropilot/packages/crud" && npx vitest run src/__tests__/crud.test.ts -t "API contract matches Elixir CRUD contract" --reporter=verbose
steps.expected: Create/read/update/delete/list + validation error shapes are structurally equivalent to Elixir contract.
steps.observed: Contract suite passed (10 passed, 34 skipped) covering all operation return shapes and error formats.

steps.action: Run full verifier: cd "/Users/sdawka/Code/bropilot/packages/crud" && npx vitest run src/__tests__/crud.test.ts --reporter=verbose
steps.expected: No regressions in full TS CRUD suite.

evidence.snippet: Contract suite: 10 passed; Full suite: 44 passed

frictions.description: Initial test-name filter for VAL-TSCRUD-002 matched zero tests.
frictions.resolution: Adjusted filter to include exact read retrieval plus read not_found contract test name and reran.
